# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.

Escape or sanitize untrusted content before rendering it. Use framework-provided safe rendering by default.
# Category: xss

<%= content_tag :div, class: "blog-posts" do %>
  <h1>Blog Posts</h1>

  <% @posts.each do |post| %>
    <%= content_tag :article, class: "blog-post", id: "post-#{post.id}" do %>
      <header class="post-header">
        <h2><%= sanitize post.title, tags: [] %></h2>
        <p class="post-meta">
          By <%= sanitize post.author_name, tags: [] %> |
          <%= post.created_at.strftime("%B %d, %Y") %>
        </p>
      </header>

      <div class="post-content">
        <%= sanitize post.content,
              tags: %w[p br strong b em i u a img ul ol li h2 h3 h4 h5 h6 blockquote pre code hr span div table thead tbody tr th td],
              attributes: %w[href src alt title class target width height] %>
      </div>

      <footer class="post-footer">
        <% if post.tags.present? %>
          <div class="post-tags">
            <strong>Tags:</strong>
            <% post.tags.each do |tag| %>
              <span class="tag"><%= sanitize tag.name, tags: [] %></span>
            <% end %>
          </div>
        <% end %>

        <div class="post-actions">
          <%= link_to "Read More", post_path(post), class: "btn btn-primary" %>
          <% if current_user && current_user.id == post.user_id %>
            <%= link_to "Edit", edit_post_path(post), class: "btn btn-secondary" %>
            <%= link_to "Delete", post_path(post), method: :delete,
                  data: { confirm: "Are you sure you want to delete this post?" },
                  class: "btn btn-danger" %>
          <% end %>
        </div>
      </footer>
    <% end %>
  <% end %>

  <% if @posts.empty? %>
    <div class="no-posts">
      <p>No blog posts yet. Be the first to write one!</p>
      <%= link_to "Create a Post", new_post_path, class: "btn btn-primary" %>
    </div>
  <% end %>

  <% if @posts.respond_to?(:total_pages) %>
    <nav class="pagination-wrapper">
      <%= paginate @posts %>
    </nav>
  <% end %>
<% end %>
